consistency_check.level_placement: Consistent (Level 20 is standard for capstone features)

quality_assessment.description_clarity: Very clear. Directly states the ability, cost (1 minute), and limitation (once per long rest).
quality_assessment.mechanical_impact: Extremely high impact. Provides a full refresh of Warlock Pact Magic slots outside of the standard Long Rest mechanic, effectively mitigating the Warlock's primary resource limitation once per day.
quality_assessment.naming_relevance: Appropriate for a 20th-level Warlock capstone feature, implying complete mastery over their patron connection.

mechanics_review.effect: Regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots.
mechanics_review.limitation: Can only be used once per long rest.
mechanics_review.balance_note: This is the standard capstone ability for the Warlock in 5e, balancing the inherent strength of quick slot recovery with a once-per-day limit.
